name: Service Catalog
description: Grid of available services and integrations with connect/manage actions. Status-dependent action buttons for service lifecycle management.

grid.description: Icon cards in a responsive grid. Each card shows service icon, name, description, status dot, and action button.

slots.header: Section title with service count Badge and optional search
slots.service-card: Card per service with icon circle, name, description, status indicator, and action Button

list.description: Compact rows for service listing. Each row shows icon, name, status chip, and action button inline.

slots.header: Section title with count and search
slots.service-row: Row with icon, name, description, status Chip, and action Button

slots.service-card: Card per service with icon, name, status, and action
